system.orderCreated: Order created. The next step is payment.
system.paymentReceived: Payment received and reserved in escrow.
system.sellerStarted: The seller started working on the order.
system.deliverySent: The seller delivered the order result. Check it and confirm delivery.
system.escrowReleased: The buyer confirmed delivery. Funds were released to the seller.
system.refunded: Funds were returned to the buyer.
system.fundsReleased: Funds were released to the seller.

messages.title: Messages
messages.selectChat: Select an order to open its chat.
messages.blockedNotice: You have blocked this user. They will not be able to message you directly.
